violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the main door to the establishment and the building lobby area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
A customer was observed with a dog in the premises. PIC informed; ADA guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Single use items are stored on the floor in the basement storage room. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
1 door low boy located in the espresso area was not in good repair. Inspector observed condensate leaking in unit at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1 door and 2 door low boys. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The floor mats in the front service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The floor/wall junctures in the back room has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
